title: treasury / yield curve / interest rates | Unknown | Interest Rate Statistics
summary: This is a U.S. Treasury landing page that describes various Treasury interest rate data series (par yield curves, real yield curves, T-bill rates, long-term rates) and their methodology. The page explains that yield data is derived from closing market bid prices obtained by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York at approximately 3:30 PM each business day. No actual rate data or current macro information is provided on this page.
